'''鈭歮-w-m-dh''' ('''kamawmedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:angelify|angelify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-m-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:angelify|angelify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-w-m-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kamawmedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimawmedhoko|thimawmedhoko]] || [[word:jimawmedhoko|jimawmedhoko]] || [[word:shimawmedhoko|shimawmedhoko]] || [[word:kimawmedhoko|kimawmedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumawmedhoko|thuthumawmedhoko]] || [[word:jujumawmedhoko|jujumawmedhoko]] || [[word:shushumawmedhoko|shushumawmedhoko]] || [[word:kukumawmedhoko|kukumawmedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumawmedhoko|thumawmedhoko]] || [[word:jumawmedhoko|jumawmedhoko]] || [[word:shumawmedhoko|shumawmedhoko]] || [[word:kumawmedhoko|kumawmedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumawmedhoko|thumawmedhoko]] || [[word:jumawmedhoko|jumawmedhoko]] || [[word:shumawmedhoko|shumawmedhoko]] || [[word:kumawmedhoko|kumawmedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themawmedhoko|themawmedhoko]] || [[word:jemawmedhoko|jemawmedhoko]] || [[word:shemawmedhoko|shemawmedhoko]] || [[word:kemawmedhoko|kemawmedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomawmedhoko|thothomawmedhoko]] || [[word:jojomawmedhoko|jojomawmedhoko]] || [[word:shoshomawmedhoko|shoshomawmedhoko]] || [[word:kokomawmedhoko|kokomawmedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomawmedhoko|thomawmedhoko]] || [[word:jomawmedhoko|jomawmedhoko]] || [[word:shomawmedhoko|shomawmedhoko]] || [[word:komawmedhoko|komawmedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomawmedhoko|thomawmedhoko]] || [[word:jomawmedhoko|jomawmedhoko]] || [[word:shomawmedhoko|shomawmedhoko]] || [[word:komawmedhoko|komawmedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙mawmedhoko|th忙mawmedhoko]] || [[word:j忙mawmedhoko|j忙mawmedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙mawmedhoko|sh忙mawmedhoko]] || [[word:k忙mawmedhoko|k忙mawmedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamawmedhoko|thathamawmedhoko]] || [[word:jajamawmedhoko|jajamawmedhoko]] || [[word:shashamawmedhoko|shashamawmedhoko]] || [[word:kakamawmedhoko|kakamawmedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamawmedhoko|thamawmedhoko]] || [[word:jamawmedhoko|jamawmedhoko]] || [[word:shamawmedhoko|shamawmedhoko]] || [[word:kamawmedhoko|kamawmedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamawmedhoko|thamawmedhoko]] || [[word:jamawmedhoko|jamawmedhoko]] || [[word:shamawmedhoko|shamawmedhoko]] || [[word:kamawmedhoko|kamawmedhoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamawmedhithi|shamawmedhithi]] || [[word:shamawmedhiji|shamawmedhiji]] || [[word:shamawmedhishi|shamawmedhishi]] || [[word:shamawmedhiki|shamawmedhiki]]
